content.en:
One after another Void Beasts appeared from the depths of the Void Region, and there were so many of them that they terrified all of the Immortal Realms and Half-Step Eternal Realms.

"It's not good, run away!"

An Eternal Realm escaped as fast as he could.

Ye Tian didn't dare to stay here, after all, he hadn't fused those immortal ancestors yet, once these three replica bodies fell, it would be a waste of this replication.

At this time, the Void Sword Lord who was in the Abyssless Land also sensed the trouble, and immediately tore the Abyssless Land and came out of the Abyssless Land.

But as soon as he came out, he was immediately targeted by the Void Beast.

Rumble!!!!!

A humanoid Void Beast that far surpassed other Void Beasts shattered Nothingness, appeared next to the Void Sword Lord, and slammed into the Void Sword Lord with a punch.

I saw that the Void Sword Lord was blown away by a punch, his body was cracked, and the Eternal Origin Weapon armor on his body was shattered.

"Fourth-Order Void Beast!"

The Void Sword Lord's expression changed drastically.

The Fourth-Order Void Beast was much more powerful than the Third-Order Void Beast, comparable to the old Immortal Realm Lord.

Although the Void Sword Lord is powerful, it is not very powerful in the Immortal Realm.16 It is just an ordinary Immortal Realm Lord, and he really can't beat the Fourth-Order Void Beast.

More importantly, he couldn't hurt a fourth-order void beast, but a fourth-order void beast could hurt him.

He didn't know if there was only one fourth-order void beast, even if there was only one fourth-order void beast, but if he cooperated with many third-order void beasts, there was still hope to kill him.

As an Eternal Realm existence of the Immortal Realm, he didn't want to fall here.

"Damn, how can there be so many Void Beasts here, this place is not too far from the Source Sea, and it is not too deep into the depths of the Void Region, it stands to reason that Void Beasts will not come here on a large scale!"

The Void Sword Lord said secretly.

He didn't have time to think about why the Void Beast had a problem, he had to get rid of this Fourth-Order Void Beast, otherwise it would be really dangerous.

Abrupt.

The Void Sword Lord divided countless sword lights, penetrating time and space and leaving, each sword light was a force for him, as long as he escaped a sword light, he could recover in a short time, which was also a means of saving his life.

The Fourth-Order Void Beast wanted to intercept the Void Sword Lord, but it only intercepted a few sword lights.

At this moment, three more fourth-order void beasts appeared, and they all blasted towards the Void Sword Lord in the air.

Suddenly, part of the Void Sword Lord's sword light was shattered again.

In the distance, the Void Sword Lord's many sword lights converged again.

But at this time, his face was extremely pale, and he was obviously not lightly injured.

"Four Fourth-Order Void Beasts, Void Beasts, what are Void Beasts going to do?"

The Void Sword Lord did not dare to delay, and fled at an extremely fast speed. And those four fourth-order void beasts already have a high level of wisdom, and they are not pressed to hunt down other Eternal Realms and half-step Eternal Realms at all, for them, those are just ants, and there is no value in chasing and killing them, and killing the Void Sword Lord is valuable.

Abrupt.

Another terrifying aura permeated, making the Void Sword Lord shiver.

"Five...... Rank Void Beast !!!"

The Void Sword Lord felt the breath of death.

He is also an Immortal Realm Lord without a doppelganger, and his Void Sword Eternal Dao is also extremely domineering, so he has not been able to condense his body so far, so he is now the main body, if the main body falls, it will really fall.

"I'm just here to collect some resources for my new concubine, how can I encounter a life and death crisis!"

The Void Sword Lord regretted it immensely.

He didn't have any thoughts of fighting the fifth-order void beast at all, even millions of eternity years ago, only one fifth-order void beast appeared, and after being severely damaged, it fled the space-time territory and entered the depths of the void region.

How rare is a fifth-order void beast, there is actually one here.

The Immortal Realm Lord couldn't compete with a fifth-order Void Beast at all, and in the Endless Time and Space Territory, as long as he surpassed the Legendary Lord above the Immortal Realm Lord, he could truly compete with a fifth-order Void Beast.

And in the Endless Time and Space Territory, there are a total of six Legendary Lords, and they are also the six presidents of the Lords Alliance, almost ignoring the facts.

This time, the fifth-order void beast appeared, and the Void Sword Lord knew that he couldn't resist, so he could only hope that one of the six guild leaders would come, otherwise he was afraid that he would not be able to escape.

"I sent a message for help early, and I hope the Lords Alliance can come to support in time!"

The Void Sword Lord said secretly.

The speed of the fifth-order void beast was too fast, and it caught up with the Void Sword Lord in an instant.

I saw that the opponent's palm full of black hair slapped over at once, and the Void Sword Lord tried his best to resist the opponent's blow, and urged some life-saving things, so he barely resisted the blow, but he was still seriously injured.

At this time, the Void Sword Leader took the initiative to use one of his hole cards.

I saw that he took out a small black sword, and after urging this small black sword, his breath withered, but the small sword released infinite sword light, and each ray of sword light was comparable to the full force of the peak powerhouse of the Immortal Realm.

The endless sword light, its power is so terrifying, I can only see that this area of nothingness has been erased.

However, the fifth-order void beast turned into nothingness, and it seemed to be there, but it did not exist in the level of nothingness, rules, and will, as if it really did not exist, leaving no trace in heaven and earth.

Therefore, this hole card of the Void Sword Lord did not hurt the fifth-order Void Beast in the slightest.

"It didn't hurt it!"

The Void Sword Lord was shocked. 220

He had never fought against a fifth-order void beast, so he didn't know the strength of a fifth-order void beast at all.

He originally thought that his hole cards would be able to hurt the top Immortal Realm Lord, maybe he would be able to hurt the fifth-order Void Beast, or buy himself a little time, but he didn't expect it to be a futile move.

Airplanes!!!!

Time and space froze, the void was still, and all the particles began to shatter.

The Void Sword Lord felt that the particles in his whole body were being annihilated little by little, and the power of his whole body was imprisoned, unable to move at all, and even the third-order eternal will began to collapse and collapse into annihilation.

"The Void Rule Realm of the Fifth Order Void Beast can turn everything into nothingness!"

The Void Sword Lord was desperate.

He couldn't escape at all, so he had to wait for death.

Just when almost ninety percent of his body was annihilated, the Void Rule Realm of the fifth-order Void Beast was shattered, and a hand reached in, directly grabbing the Void Sword Lord and leaving.

Distance.

The Void Sword Lord appeared, standing beside a young man.

"Thank you, Lord of the Six Suns!"

The Void Sword Lord said respectfully.

Lord of the Six Suns, one of the six legendary lords of the Endless Time and Space Territory, and one of the six presidents of the Lords Alliance.

Seeing the Lord of the Six Suns, the Void Sword Lord breathed a sigh of relief.

His life was saved!_

Fei Lu reminds you: three things to read - ∪ collection, recommendation, and sharing!(wx_938914883)
